name: Clip
description: Clip — Mexico payment acceptance platform for SMBs supporting card-present POS, QR, and online payments via Visa/Mastercard.

seo.title: Clip — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Clip: Clip — Mexico payment acceptance platform for SMBs supporting card-present POS, QR, and online payments via Visa/Mastercard.

when_to_use: Card-present POS acceptance for SMBs in Mexico via chip reader
QR code payment collection for Mexican market using Clip terminal
Online payment checkout for Mexican merchants via Visa/Mastercard API
Omnichannel payment acceptance combining POS and e-commerce in Mexico

cons: SMB pricing less competitive at scale
review.verdict: Strong Mexican SMB payment acceptance with hardware and app — a Square-style play for LatAm.
review.best_for: Mexican SMBs and retailers needing POS plus online acceptance
review.not_for: Enterprises or non-Mexican merchants needing API-first gateways

developer_experience.reason: APIs for POS and online, regional focus
